refinement_sections.content: We need to figure out what exactly we want to evaluate about the machine learning model. This includes understanding customer churn and why it matters for a subscription service.
Since we don't have the testing data, we should think about how to get some. We might ask the client for data or look for publicly available datasets that have similar characteristics.

We need to decide which performance metrics to use. Common ones for churn prediction could be accuracy, precision, recall, and F1 score. We should also think about what these metrics mean for the business.
We should learn about overfitting and how to check if our model is overfitting. This might include looking at training vs testing performance.
Based on our findings, we will suggest changes to the model or data if needed, but first we need to understand the current performance.
